snippet.title: Anthony Capuano, President & CEO, Marriott International, interviewed by David Kong
snippet.description: Tony shares his career journey ascending to his current role leading Marriott and his learnings along the way. We discuss the leadership role Marriott has played in ESG and DEI efforts in the industry and how that helps Marriott. He shares mentoring advice he received from Bill Marriott and Arne Sorenson, and also offers lessons in leadership, work life balance and strategic agility. He also shares advice for self empowerment.
snippet.channelTitle: It's Personal Stories, A Hospitality Podcast

localized.title: Anthony Capuano, President & CEO, Marriott International, interviewed by David Kong
localized.description: Tony shares his career journey ascending to his current role leading Marriott and his learnings along the way. We discuss the leadership role Marriott has played in ESG and DEI efforts in the industry and how that helps Marriott. He shares mentoring advice he received from Bill Marriott and Arne Sorenson, and also offers lessons in leadership, work life balance and strategic agility. He also shares advice for self empowerment.

snippet.title: Marriott's President & CEO Anthony Capuano: See A Long Runway Of Appetite For Luxury In India
snippet.description:
CEO of the world's largest hospitality player Marriott International says 'India Is A Compelling Market' as they hike their India target from 200 to 250 hotels by 2025. Anthony Capuano tells Shereen Bhan that global travel trends don't indicate a demand saturation yet, adds that he expects the ''Bleisure'' travel trend to continue.

#anthonycapuano #marriott #marriottinternational #india #cnbctv18 #businessnews #businessnewstoday #businessnewsinenglish #sharemarkettoday
